metadata.description: Investment analysis skills + price-alert pipeline + real-time SEC Form 4 insider-firehose for Claude Code. Top-down macro-aware framework, bilingual EN/CN, real data via yfinance + openinsider + FRED + SEC EDGAR. For personal-finance buy-side use (swing / position / LEAPS) — not HFT.

plugins.name: claude-investment-skills
plugins.description: 15 investment skills with pre-flight methodology (macro → insider → 3-tier → sizing → tax). Telegram alert pipeline (price-alert + Form 4 insider firehose) + optional Cloudflare Worker webhook for 1-3 sec NL chat. v2.0: adds real-time SEC EDGAR Form 4 monitor with Telegram push for officer/director buys ≥ $200k.
